title: OPENAI / ANTHROPIC provisioning
blocking_what: Critic seat and Rung 2 live evaluation
required_founder_action: Founder to provide API keys and configure credentials

title: Apple Developer access
required_founder_action: Founder to register developer account and invite agent
note: Apple Developer Program renewed 2026-07-06; active, renews 2027-07-06.

title: App Store Connect and bundle ID
required_founder_action: Founder to create bundle ID com.hasf.rmfcompanion and register App on ASC

title: signing certificates / provisioning profiles
required_founder_action: Founder to generate iOS Distribution certificate and provisioning profile

title: remote host credential posture
required_founder_action: Founder to set up safe SSH keys on remote droplets

title: secrets inventory
required_founder_action: Founder to review secrets stored in .secrets/ has_live_project_tracker/data/
